title: See the Republicans voted out Speaker Kevin McCarthy
shortDescription: Matt Gaetz led the charge to out Kevin McCarthy. See the Republicans that voted with him.

title: Ex-White House and CIA analyst accused of spying for South Korea
shortDescription: Sue Mi Terry, a 54-year-old former senior White House employee and CIA analyst, is accused of spying for South Korea in exchange for luxury goods.

title: RNC vibe check: Somber but confident in a Trump victory
shortDescription: From the food trucks to the convention hall, Trump Republicans marvel at his survival of an assassination attempt and Biden's latest struggles.

title: RNC speeches: Florida congressman Brian Mast
shortDescription: Watch Florida congressman Brian Mast speak at the Republican National Convention in Milwaukee, Wisconsin.

title: Senators want Secret Service head's ouster after Trump attack briefing
shortDescription: Senators called for new Secret Service leadership after a briefing with investigators on the attack against former President Donald Trump at a rally.

title: This photo doesn't show Barron Trump at rally shooting | Fact check
shortDescription: The photo was captured in Florida four days before the assassination attempt on Donald Trump.

title: President Biden has COVID, taking him off the campaign trail
shortDescription: President Joe Biden’s COVID diagnosis takes him off the campaign trail and punctuates a brutal stretch that began with a disastrous June 27 debate.

title: Who will be on the ticket? Trump campaign burns Biden over VP debate
shortDescription: Donald Trump's campaign says it can't commit to date for VP debate because it doesn't know which Democrat will be on the presidential ticket.

title: RNC live fact check: See what JD Vance, Trump Jr. get right and wrong
shortDescription: Follow along as the USA TODAY Fact Check Team separates fact from fiction and adds context where the speakers don't.

title: These politicians were against Trump. Now they are backing him at RNC
shortDescription: While participants at the RNC have touted a message of Republican unity, many of the same politicians had strained relations with Trump in the past.

title: No, Trump's suit did not have bullet hole | Fact check
shortDescription: No bullets hit Trump in the torso or passed through his jacket, according to video and photos of the moment, and to the former president's comments.

title: Prosecutor appeals dismissal of Trump classified documents case
shortDescription: Special counsel Jack Smith has appealed Judge Aileen Cannon's dismissal of former President Donald Trump's criminal classified documents case.

title: Biden says only a 'medical condition' would push him to reassess race
shortDescription: President Joe Biden said he would only consider ending his campaign if he is told by doctors that he has a medical condition.

title: Why Ron DeSantis says Joe Biden needs to stay in the presidential race
shortDescription: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis said Biden’s shaky debate performance in late June showed he is not fit for office.

title: What to know about Agenda47, Trump's official policy plan
shortDescription: Agenda47 is what Trump's campaign calls their official policy plan for the 2024 election season. What it says on education, immigration and more.

title: Trending song "Trump Trump Baby" features Amber Rose
shortDescription: Rap song "Trump Trump Baby" featuring model Amber Rose is a hit at the RNC

title: 'Maxwell Yearick' wasn't shooter at Trump campaign rally | Fact check
shortDescription: The suspect in the attempted assassination of Trump is Thomas Matthew Crooks, not Maxwell Yearick.
